sections.paragraph:
verb לנשוק

to kiss; touch, meet together

verb להשיק

to launch; touch, be tangential

verb להשקות

to irrigate, water; give to drink

verb הושק

be launched; made touch; made tangent

verb הושקה

be irrigated, watered; given to drink

masculine noun

sack, bag, pocket, sacking

masculine noun

cheque, check (Amer.)
